name: website-monitor-agent
description: AI-powered website change monitor using Playwright + Gemini + Discord

scripts.start: API_PORT=3001 concurrently -n api,ui,mon,bot -c cyan,magenta,yellow,blue "tsx --watch src/agent.ts" "npm run client:dev" "tsx src/health-monitor.ts" "tsx src/discord-bot.ts"
scripts.stop: bash -c 'pkill -9 -f src/agent.ts || true; pkill -9 -f src/health-monitor.ts || true; pkill -9 -f src/discord-bot.ts || true; pkill -9 -f concurrently || true; pkill -9 -f vite || true; pkill -9 -f .browser-profile || true; for port in 3001 5173 5174 5175; do lsof -ti:$port 2>/dev/null | xargs -r kill -9; done; rm -f .browser-profile/Singleton*; sleep 2; REMAINING=$(ps aux | grep -E "src/agent|src/health-monitor|src/discord-bot|concurrently|vite" | grep -v grep | wc -l); echo "Stopped. Remaining app processes: $REMAINING"'
scripts.watch-browser: set RUN_ONCE=true&& set BROWSER_HEADLESS=false&& set BROWSER_SLOW_MO_MS=250&& set BROWSER_KEEP_OPEN_MS=5000&& tsx src/agent.ts
scripts.browser_mode: set BROWSER_PERSIST_SESSION=true&& set BROWSER_HEADLESS=false&& tsx src/agent.ts
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,ui -c cyan,magenta "npm run api:dev" "npm run client:dev"
